title: Pan, amor y Andalucía
writer: Jesús María de Arozamena, Sandro Continenza, Luciana Corda
actors: Carmen Sevilla, Vittorio De Sica, Vicente Parra
plot: Determined to postpone his own wedding, a former marshal leaves his bride-to-be and participates in an international music festival in Spain, where he falls for a young dancer.
